items.title: Can't go under on Keaton Wagler. He has limitless range. One of his best attributes is not only his shooting, but he can also shoot it from deep providing even more spacing.

items.title: Biggest thing just from watching Keaton Wagler for these first three games in Las Vegas is it definitely feels like the actual NBA will suit him more than this setting will, especially with the talent around him and a roster with more levers for him to pull from.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Biggest thing just from watching Keaton Wagler for these first three games in Las Vegas is it definitely feels like the actual NBA will suit him more than this setting will, especially with the talent around him and a roster with more levers for him to pull from.

items.title: Even on the segments of play where his shot isn’t falling, I’m still impressed with how poised Keaton Wagler is, especially at 19, and the biggest positive of all is that they keep putting the ball in his hands and getting him the requisite reps.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Even on the segments of play where his shot isn’t falling, I’m still impressed with how poised Keaton Wagler is, especially at 19, and the biggest positive of all is that they keep putting the ball in his hands and getting him the requisite reps.

items.title: Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler's 3rd quarter:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler's 3rd quarter:

"It was great. I feel like no one really panicked after last game. It was a rough game for all of us. And just seeing him today play like he's played the whole year has been great. But I feel that we all kind of expected it."

items.title: Asked Jay Larranaga about what, if anything, he did to help free up Keaton Wagler
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Jay Larranaga about what, if anything, he did to help free up Keaton Wagler

Jay did not see it that way. He shared that he shared a text from his wife with the team after Thursday's game that said "stay deaf to the negativity and focus on the goal"

items.title: Asked Jay Larranaga how he’s seen Keaton Wagler’s ability to process information: “His processing, his skill level, resiliency, his just really—he plays the game without an agenda. If someone’s open, he passes to them. If he has a mismatch, he attacks it. It’s really fun to watch
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Asked Jay Larranaga how he’s seen Keaton Wagler’s ability to process information: “His processing, his skill level, resiliency, his just really—he plays the game without an agenda. If someone’s open, he passes to them. If he has a mismatch, he attacks it. It’s really fun to watch.”

items.title: Asked Keaton Wagler how he’s become so adept at processing: “Just trying to stay under control and take all the information in. Play freely is the biggest thing. ... Today we wanted to play fast, and that’s what I did from the start was just try to get the ball out fast and push
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Asked Keaton Wagler how he’s become so adept at processing: “Just trying to stay under control and take all the information in. Play freely is the biggest thing. ... Today we wanted to play fast, and that’s what I did from the start was just try to get the ball out fast and push in transition.”

items.title: Keaton Wagler postgame says Baba Miller is an underrated player. Plays really good defense and doesn't force anything on offense. Does the little things.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Keaton Wagler postgame says Baba Miller is an underrated player. Plays really good defense and doesn't force anything on offense. Does the little things. 

On his own 23-point game: Stayed under control. Learned from last game to handle the physicality and play at his own pace. Playing freely.

items.title: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.

items.title: Keaton Wagler in a blowout win against the Utah Jazz: 28 MINS │ 23 PTS │ 1 REB │ 4 AST │ 6-16 FG │ 4-7 3P │ 3-4 FT │ +19 +/-
items.author: YujiDomainExpansion
items.body_excerpt: Source: https://www.espn.com/nba-summer-league/game/\_/gameId/401881850/league/nba-summer-las-vegas Keaton Wagler in a blowout win against the Utah Jazz: 28 MINS │ 23 PTS │ 1 REB │ 4 AST │ 6-16 FG │ 4-7 3P │ 3-4 FT │ +19 +/-

items.title: Keaton Wagler’s night is done after a 23-point performance, with 18 coming in the third quarter. Wagler, who played 28 minutes, finishes with 4 assists, as well. The No. 5 overall selection was 6-for-16 from the field but went 4-for-7 on 3s. A very good display of aggression.
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Clippers lead Jazz 82-56 after three. Keaton Wagler has 23 points for the game, with 18 coming in the third quarter alone. Wagler was 5-for-8 in the third with 3 made 3s. That was some kind of show from Wagler in the frame, and the Clippers have blown this one wide open.

items.title: Keaton Wagler’s second 3-pointer of the night has pulled the Clippers into a 53-44 lead. Wagler has 10 points and 3 assists in 17 minutes. The aggression has been there, even if the shotmaking, in large quantities, has not.

items.title: Halftime: Clippers 40, Jazz 38. It’s been a more aggressive offensive showing for Keaton Wagler tonight, as the No. 5 overall pick has already taken 7 shots. Wagler has 5 points and 3 assists. Baba Miller with 9 points. Darryn Peterson leads all scorers with 12 points for Utah.

items.title: Keaton Wagler did a good job of not turning the ball over. He absorbed doubles regularly and got the ball out.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Keaton Wagler did a good job of not turning the ball over. He absorbed doubles regularly and got the ball out.

But the rollers weren't threatening, the shooters didn't get off, and KW was otherwise too accepting of letting the Kings cancel him.

items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

items.title: Halftime: Kings 44, Clippers 41. Cam Christie has 11 points and 5 rebounds, and Keaton Wagler got his first points as a Clipper on a 3-pointer. Clippers shooting 36% overall. Kings at 35%. Kings have doubled up the Clippers in FGA (44-22). A real Summer League vibe for this one.
items.author: Justin Russo

That deal was between the Raptors and Pelicans, involving a Pacers pick and now the two will play for the Clippers together.

The NBA, lol!

items.title: Asked Keaton Wagler what led him to pick #1 as his jersey number: “I think it’s just something different. I’ve never worn No. 1. ... I saw the jersey numbers I could pick from and I thought 1 would be the best kinda just for something new. First time in the NBA, No. 1, I think it
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Asked Keaton Wagler what led him to pick #1 as his jersey number: “I think it’s just something different. I’ve never worn No. 1. ... I saw the jersey numbers I could pick from and I thought 1 would be the best kinda just for something new. First time in the NBA, No. 1, I think it goes well.”

items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Keaton Wagler about what he learned about the Clippers in this draft process and if he told them he wanted to be here

"I learned a lot throughout this whole process, talking with them at the combine. And then when I came and worked out here, I got to spend, you know, a good 3 days here...

items.title: Keaton Wagler said that he watches several NBA guards in the league, but mentioned Tyrese Haliburton and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander as the two he really tends to take after. Wagler said “closest person is probably Haliburton” for his play style.
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Lawrence Frank mentioned that he didn’t care about the 46-point game Keaton Wagler had against Purdue, saying, “What we do is we’ll watch the worst game, and then we’ll take an account of all the middling games … to get a truer sense.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank mentioned that he didn’t care about the 46-point game Keaton Wagler had against Purdue, saying, “What we do is we’ll watch the worst game, and then we’ll take an account of all the middling games … to get a truer sense.”

items.title: Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler: "He was the best decelerator in the draft"
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler: "He was the best decelerator in the draft"

items.title: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.

items.title: Lawerence Frank on Keaton Wagler: “We were blown away not just with his game but his character.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawerence Frank on Keaton Wagler: “We were blown away not just with his game but his character.”

items.title: Frank on Wagler: "What's really unique about him is how's a guy who's not, 'athletic,' get to all the spots on the floor? How's he find a way to punish every mistake the defense makes?  And that's where the craft, the guile, he's got incredible body balance...
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Frank on Wagler: "What's really unique about him is how's a guy who's not, 'athletic,' get to all the spots on the floor? How's he find a way to punish every mistake the defense makes?  And that's where the craft, the guile, he's got incredible body balance...

items.title: Lawrence Frank said that Clippers GM Trent Redden went to see Illinois practice in October, and wrote a report after that practice: “Trent saw Keaton on Oct. 19. No one knew who Keaton Wagler was. … ‘Everyone has to know this guy.’”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank said that Clippers GM Trent Redden went to see Illinois practice in October, and wrote a report after that practice: “Trent saw Keaton on Oct. 19. No one knew who Keaton Wagler was. … ‘Everyone has to know this guy.’”

items.title: Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler

"With Keaton, from a basketball quality standpoint, we put a big premium on positional size.  Keaton can play both on and off the ball. He can play 2 positions"

items.title: Lawrence Frank on the selection of Keaton Wagler: “We want to make sure we draft someone who is obsessed with winning above all else. … We put a big premium on positional size.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank on the selection of Keaton Wagler: “We want to make sure we draft someone who is obsessed with winning above all else. … We put a big premium on positional size.”

items.title: Lawrence Frank: “Tremendous day tonight. Really exciting moment for the Clippers organization and Clippers fans. We’re extremely excited that we drafted Keaton Wagler.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank: “Tremendous day tonight. Really exciting moment for the Clippers organization and Clippers fans. We’re extremely excited that we drafted Keaton Wagler.”

items.title: Keaton Wagler didn’t work out for the Brooklyn Nets but met with them. “I already worked out for Chicago, then I was going to the Clippers. That’s four and five. Hearing from them snd knowing where I stood, I knew I didn’t need to work out, but still meeting with teams and talkin
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler didn’t work out for the Brooklyn Nets but met with them. “I already worked out for Chicago, then I was going to the Clippers. That’s four and five. Hearing from them snd knowing where I stood, I knew I didn’t need to work out, but still meeting with teams and talking to them.”
